thinks.think: The man on the left in a yellow striped shirt lowers his hand from a blurred gesture to his side while speaking with an open mouth. The man on the right stands still in a black and grey jacket with a gold chain. Both figures stay against the white brick wall.

The video cuts to a static title card showing a pink-tinted city skyline with a suspension bridge at the bottom. Centered text reads "I'M THE Last" in dark and white fonts. The text then updates to include "O.G" in white script font to the right.

The title card adds "BECAUSE..." below the text over a pink skyline. The scene cuts back to the two men against the white brick wall. The man in the yellow striped shirt stands with arms crossed, looking right. The man in the black and grey jacket gestures with both hands near his chest while speaking.

Large white capital letters overlay the scene featuring the two men. The text 'I STILL DRIVE' appears across the center initially. This phrase updates to include 'A ELDORADO' within the display. The man in the yellow shirt remains with arms crossed, while the man in the black jacket looks downward.

Large white zeros overlay the right side of the screen, partially obscuring the man in the black jacket. The shot then cuts to a close-up of the man in the yellow striped shirt looking directly forward with his mouth open, excluding most of the second man from the frame.

The man in the yellow striped shirt gestures with both hands while large white text "I DON'T" overlays the screen. The text changes to "I DON'T KNOW ALL MY KIDS" as he smiles, remaining centered in a close-up shot against the white brick wall.

The man in the yellow striped shirt faces forward with a serious expression. Large white text overlays his chest, expanding sequentially. The phrase begins as "I DON'T KNOW ALL MY KIDS" and extends to read "I DON'T KNOW ALL MY KIDS BY THEIR FIRST NAME" in the final shot.

The text overlay disappears as the view widens to include the second man in the black jacket. The man in the yellow shirt turns his head to look at him, and the man in the jacket looks back before both face forward toward the camera with their hands held in front of their bodies.

Large white text spelling 'LAST' overlays the two men standing against the white brick wall. Once the text disappears, the man in the yellow striped shirt turns his head to look at the man in the black jacket, who looks downward with his hands clasped in front of him.

The man in the yellow striped shirt turns toward his companion, gesturing with his right hand while speaking with an open mouth. Beside him, the man in the black and grey jacket crosses his arms over his chest and stares directly forward with a serious expression.

The man in the yellow striped shirt widens his eyes significantly and forms an oval mouth shape while facing forward. Beside him, the man in the black and grey jacket keeps his arms crossed, staring straight ahead with a very steady expression and slight head tilt.

Large white text reading "BREAKFAST CEREAL OUT OF A MIXING BOWL" appears over the man in the yellow striped shirt, who faces forward with his mouth slightly open. To the right, only the shoulder and arm of the man in the black and grey jacket remain visible against the white brick background.

The text overlay disappears, revealing both men fully in the frame again. The man in the yellow striped shirt looks toward the man on the right with his mouth closed. The man in the black and grey jacket with the gold chain holds his mouth open while facing slightly upward against the white brick wall background.

The man in the yellow striped shirt looks at the man on the right, smiling slightly with lips parted. The man in the black and grey jacket with striped cuffs and thick gold chain closes his mouth, facing forward with a neutral expression while standing against the white brick wall background.

The man in the black and grey jacket raises his right hand in an emphatic gesture while speaking. He wears a thick gold chain. The man in the yellow striped shirt is partially visible on the left side. The background remains a white brick wall throughout the scene.

Large white text spelling "NOT THE NUN - CHUCKS" appears across the screen. The man in the yellow striped shirt moves his hands rapidly in a blurred chopping motion. The man in the black and grey jacket stands still with arms crossed, facing forward against the white brick background.

The on-screen text expands to include "OH" below "CHUCKS" as the man in the yellow shirt smiles. Subsequently, all text vanishes. The man in the black and grey jacket maintains his crossed-arm stance, facing forward with a neutral expression against the white brick background.

The man wearing the yellow striped polo shirt smiles broadly, displaying his teeth, while facing forward against the white brick wall background. His head tilts slightly to the side. The man in the black and grey jacket remains partially visible on the right edge. No text overlays appear during this segment.

The man in the yellow striped polo shirt raises his right hand, making a small pinching gesture with his thumb and forefinger. White text reading "THIS MUCH" appears next to his hand. He wears a gold bracelet on his wrist. The other man is partially visible on the right edge wearing a grey sleeve.

The text overlay disappears. The shot widens to include both men. The man in the yellow striped shirt looks toward his companion. The man in the black and grey jacket faces him with his mouth open, appearing to speak, while wearing a thick gold chain against a white brick background.

The man in the black and grey jacket continues speaking, his mouth moving as he faces the man in the yellow striped shirt. The man in the yellow shirt maintains his gaze on the speaker. Both remain seated against the white brick wall, with the gold chain visible on the jacketed man's chest.

The man in the black and grey jacket turns his head to face forward and brings his hands together, clasping them at his waist. Simultaneously, the man in the yellow striped shirt turns his head to look toward the left side of the frame, away from his companion. Both remain seated against the white brick wall background.

Large white text spelling "SIX" appears centered over the two men against the white brick wall. The man in the yellow striped shirt looks toward the left side of the frame, while the man in the black and grey jacket faces forward with his hands clasped at his waist.

Large white text reading "SIX" expands to include "DIFFERENT WAYS" below it, overlaying the man in the yellow striped shirt. He raises his hand while speaking, then the text vanishes as he smiles and gestures with his right hand against the white brick background.

Large white text reading "ALTERNATOR" appears centered over the two men against the white brick wall. The man in the yellow striped shirt stands with hands clasped in front, while the man in the black and grey jacket stands beside him with arms crossed, looking forward.

The large white text "ALTERNATOR" transitions to a stylized "ALTE CAR" overlay on the right. The man in the yellow striped shirt turns his head right, while the man in the black jacket turns left, resulting in the two men looking directly at each other against the white brick background.

The large white text overlay disappears. The man in the yellow striped shirt extends his right arm outward with an open palm, gesturing toward the man in the black jacket. The man in the black jacket looks directly at the gesturing man, wearing a gold chain, while standing against the white brick wall.

The man in the yellow striped shirt lowers his extended right arm, returning to a neutral standing position with hands at his sides. Beside him, the man in the black and grey jacket turns his gaze from his companion to face forward, his mouth slightly open as if speaking or reacting against the white brick background.

White text reading "I'M GONNA WALK AWAY" appears centered between the two men. The man in the yellow striped shirt turns his gaze forward from his companion. The man in the black and grey jacket with the gold chain stands facing forward with a neutral expression against the white brick wall.

The white text overlay disappears. The man in the yellow striped shirt extends his right arm forward with an open palm, gesturing toward the right side of the frame where a blurred figure is partially visible. He looks in that direction against the white brick background.

The man in the yellow striped shirt stands facing forward against a white brick wall. The white text overlay reading "THAT'S UNFAIR" disappears from the right side of the screen. He maintains a neutral expression with his arms at his sides.

The man in the yellow striped shirt stands facing forward against a white brick wall. The scene cuts to a title card featuring large, metallic gold text reading "THE Last O.G." centered on a pale pink background, with smaller text below indicating "NEW SERIES" and "TUESDAYS 10:30/9:30C".

A pale pink end card appears, featuring a large cutout of the man in the black jacket on the left. The gold show logo centers over a bridge skyline background. Purple text reading "WATCH MORE", "SUBSCRIBE", and "DOWNLOAD APP" is visible.

A static promotional end card persists, featuring a large cutout of a man in a gold chain on the left against a pale pink backdrop. White script text "THE Last O.G." centers above a faint bridge skyline. Purple call-to-action text reading "WATCH MORE," "SUBSCRIBE," and "DOWNLOAD APP" remains fixed in the corners.

White script text reading "THE Last O.G." stays centered, flanked by dark pink call-to-action text in the corners.

The static promotional end card remains on screen unchanged. A large cutout of a man wearing a thick gold chain stays on the left against a pale pink background with a faint bridge skyline. White script text reading "THE Last O.G." remains centered, flanked by dark pink call-to-action text in the corners.
